title: Psychology: Personality
description:
Discover the world of personality psychology with this engaging online course. You’ll explore key theories, uncover what shapes personality, and examine how traits influence behavior, relationships, and life outcomes. Whether you're interested in psychology, personal development, or professional applications, this course provides valuable insights.  
 What You’ll Explore: 
- Personality Theories & Models – Learn about the Big Five, HEXACO, and other frameworks for understanding personality. 
- The Origins of Personality – Examine how genetics, environment, and evolution shape individual traits. 
- Nature vs. Nurture – Understand the role of biology and experiences in personality development. 
- Adult Attachment & Relationships – Explore how early attachment styles impact emotions and behavior in adulthood. 
- The Dark Triad – Investigate the traits of narcissism, Machiavellianism, and psychopathy and their influence on relationships and leadership.  
 Why Take This Course? 
- Engaging Content – Interactive videos, quizzes, and case studies make learning dynamic. 
- Global Relevance – Personality research spans cultures and applies across industries. 
- Career & Personal Growth – Ideal for students, professionals, and anyone curious about human nature.  
 By the end of this course, you’ll have a strong foundation in personality psychology, equipping you with insights that can be applied to relationships, workplace interactions, and further study in psychology.
